title: Author ShopHomeViewModel
blocks: 12-author-shop-home-view-task (ui task that renders against this view model)
description: Create the view model for the shop's home screen. Shop home is the storefront: it shows a hero banner, a row of aisle category cards, and a 'Featured' collection containing every widget in the catalog with a real working toolbar that lets the visitor search by name, sort, filter by aisle, and switch between bento/list/grid layouts live.

context.screen_purpose: Shop home is the first thing the visitor sees. Its job is to make the scale of the widget library immediately visible and to demonstrate the collection widgets (TCollectionSection + TCollectionToolbar + TCollectionCard + TCategorySection + TCategoryCard + TCollectionHeader) doing real work — not a decorative mock.
context.toolbar_behaviour: The TCollectionToolbar above the Featured section must actually filter the list. Search is a case-insensitive substring match on widget name or tagline. Sort cycles by name or aisle. Filter narrows by aisle. Layout toggles between the three TCollectionSectionLayout enum values.
context.state_shape: The view model holds reactive cells for searchQuery, sortValue, filterValue, and featuredLayout. The visible featured list is derived from these four cells and the catalog service — it is not stored separately.

goals: ShopHomeViewModel extends TBaseViewModel and lives under example/lib/showcase/feature/shop_home/views/shop_home/.
All mutable state is exposed as read-only ValueListenables backed by TNotifiers.
The featured list is derived from the four filter/sort/layout cells plus ShowcaseCatalogService — no duplicated list stored on the view model.
Empty search results produce an explicit 'empty' state the view can render as in-place content.
Opening a product emits a callback that the shell view model (or router) handles — this view model does not own navigation.
non_goals: Routing decisions — delegate to the shell view model or router.
Storing a pre-computed copy of the filtered list.
acceptance_criteria: Setting the search query to a known widget name produces a featured list containing only that widget.
Clearing the search query restores the full list.
Sort by name orders featured alphabetically; sort by aisle groups by aisle key.
Filter by aisle returns only entries whose aisle matches.
Layout toggle updates the exposed layout cell without touching any other state.
Empty filter results expose an 'is empty' observable the view will bind to.
constraints: Follow dev-conventions/views-and-view-models.md and dev-conventions/state.md. Empty state is in-view content, not an error condition.
No duplication between this view model and ShowcaseCatalogService. The catalog is the single source of truth for the full list.
All filtering/sorting logic is pure — deterministic given inputs, no side effects.
tools_to_use: RepoPrompt MCP for reading TCollectionToolbar, TCollectionSection, and their layout enum to know what the view model must expose.

testing_and_verification.unit_tests: Test the filter/sort/layout pipeline with a fake catalog containing a known set of entries. Verify: (1) substring search matches across name and tagline and is case-insensitive, (2) sort modes produce the expected ordering, (3) aisle filter narrows correctly, (4) an empty result exposes the correct empty-state observable, (5) combining filter + search + sort produces the expected union. No mocks — pass a real ShowcaseCatalogService constructed with a fixed entry list. Gherkin-style structure. Do not test string equality of any error or message.

quality_checklist.maintainability: The featured list is derived, not stored. Adding a new sort mode touches one switch.
quality_checklist.dry: Filtering logic is not duplicated from anywhere. It lives only on this view model.
quality_checklist.single_responsibility: Shop home state only. No product detail logic.
quality_checklist.performance: Derivation is memoised within a single frame — no repeated O(n) sort on unrelated cell changes.

worklog.summary: Created ShopHomeViewModel with derived featured list, toolbar-driven filtering/sorting/search, and full Gherkin-style test coverage.
changes: Created showcase/feature/shop_home/views/shop_home/shop_home_view_model.dart: TBaseViewModel<void> with TNotifier<String> searchQuery, TNotifier<String?> sortValue, TNotifier<String?> filterValue, TNotifier<TCollectionSectionLayout> featuredLayout
Derived getter featuredEntries: filter by aisle → search by name/tagline (case-insensitive) → sort by Name or Aisle
Convenience getter isFeaturedEmpty for empty-state binding
Static sort option constants: sortByName, sortByAisle, sortOptions
Mutators: updateSearchQuery, updateSortValue, updateFilterValue, updateLayout, selectProduct (delegates to callback)
No GetIt registration — callback parameter makes factory registration awkward; view constructs inline

Created test/showcase/feature/shop_home/views/shop_home/shop_home_view_model_test.dart: 28 Gherkin-style tests covering search, sort, filter, layout, empty state, combined filters, product selection, reactive notifications

workflow_instructions: On done: set `done`, add `worklog`, move to `workspace/tasks/archive/dev/04-author-shop-home-view-model-task.json`.
Add `follow_up_notes` to 12-author-shop-home-view-task with the public API signature this view model exposes.
